chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Revision Appln.No.S-38 of 2024. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For the hearing of the main case. 03. For orders on M.A.No.4100/2024 (426 Cr.PC). 25.07.2024 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shewak Rathore, D.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = On completion of trial, the aggregate sentence awarded to the applicant by the learned trial Court was three years with fine/daman with benefit of Section 382-B Cr.PC, which he impugned by preferring an appeal; it was dismissed by learned appellate Court; such dismissal of his appeal, he has impugned before this Court by preferring the instant Crl.Revision Application and in the meanwhile, by way of the listed application has sought his release on bail by suspending the operation of the impugned sentence, which is not opposed by learned D.P.G for the State. Heard arguments and perused the record. The applicant was on bail before learned appellate Court; the aggregate sentence awarded to him being three years is short one and hearing of his revision application is likely to take time on account of heavy pendency, therefore, while relying upon the case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR-2589), the sentence awarded to the applicant is suspended and he is directed to be released on bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

The applicant was on bail before learned appellate Court; the aggregate sentence awarded to him being three years is short one and hearing of his revision application is likely to take time on account of heavy pendency, therefore, while relying upon the case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR-2589), the sentence awarded to the applicant is suspended and he is directed to be released on bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The listed application (M.A.No.4100/2024) is disposed of accordingly. Adjourned to date in office for hearing of revision application. JUDGE
